package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationManualIndexLoopWithoutBoundsNeed() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_manual_index_loop_without_bounds_need"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag manual index loops over slices where range would avoid repeated bounds-sensitive indexing."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
